summary: Iteration 17: Backend refactoring verification complete. All 42 API endpoint tests passed. The monolithic server.py (2500+ lines) has been successfully refactored into modular structure (server.py now 75 lines). All routes work correctly after refactoring.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - health check returns healthy status
POST /api/auth/login - user login returns JWT tokens
GET /api/auth/me - returns current user profile with bearer token
GET /api/shared/{share_id} - public shared project view (no auth)
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful: server.py reduced from 2500+ lines to 75 lines
Code properly organized into core/, models/, routes/, services/ directories
All imports working correctly across modules
MongoDB _id properly excluded from all responses
JWT authentication working correctly with get_current_user dependency
All 42 API endpoints tested and working
seed_data_creation: Created test user test_refactor@example.com for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified the backend refactoring. The monolithic server.py has been split into: core/config.py (env vars), core/database.py (MongoDB), core/security.py (JWT/auth), models/schemas.py (Pydantic models), routes/auth.py, routes/users.py, routes/projects.py, routes/ai.py, routes/deployments.py, routes/subscriptions.py, routes/admin.py, routes/templates.py, routes/shared.py, services/ai.py, services/email.py, services/stripe_service.py. All 42 API endpoints tested and working. MOCKED: AI generation (demo mode when XAI_API_KEY not set), Stripe checkout (demo mode when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY not set), Deployment (simulated).

mocked_features.AI generation: Returns demo content when XAI_API_KEY is not set
mocked_features.Stripe checkout: Returns demo URL when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is not set
mocked_features.Deployment: Simulated - creates deployment record but doesn't actually deploy
